subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou beholdest how the Praised One hath drawn nigh unto Thy praised station, and verily he hath attained unto Thy presence when he was illumined [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی تری المحمود اقبل الی مقامک المحمود و انه فاز بلقائک اذ کان نیر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @love of God
